certificates.title: PEKAN ILMIAH MAHASISWA NASIONAL 38B
certificates.description:
Proud and grateful to have participated in the National Student Scientific Week (PIMNAS).

PIMNAS was an invaluable experience to compete, learn, and exchange ideas with students from universities across Indonesia.

certificates.title: PKM 38
certificates.description:
our team was awarded funding through the Student Creativity Program (PKM).

This funding represents both trust and responsibility to further develop our ideas, conduct research, and deliver meaningful outcomes.
